# signpostsEnabled

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value that indicates whether a log is able to use signpost logging.

## Declaration

```swift
var signpostsEnabled: Bool { get }
```

## Getting Log Configuration

- **isEnabled(type:)**: Returns a Boolean value that indicates whether the log can write messages with the specified log type.
